prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 persistent depressive disorder criteria; structured assessment common

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with access to psychotherapy; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care and mental health services often use stepped-care pathways
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Psychotherapy and antidepressants when indicated; management of comorbid anxiety and chronic illness
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for therapy and variability across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to evidence-based care in many systems
